entries.source: "Help me outline a story"
entries.value: "Lagundu istorio baten eskema egiten"

entries.source: "Improve my essay introduction"
entries.value: "Hobetu nire idazlanaren sarrera"

entries.source: "Make this paragraph clearer"
entries.value: "Argitu paragrafo hau"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Writing Coach on inspir for communication learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Writing Coach inspir-en erabiltzeko gida praktikoa, komunikazio-ikaskuntzarako, promptak, ikasketa-zikloak eta AI ohitura seguruagoak barne.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Ikasketa-ziklo sendoagoa

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI tutorea

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays And Drafts: practical guide
entries.value: Idazlan eta zirriborroetarako AI Writing Coach: gida praktikoa

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Improve essays, stories, emails, and arguments with targeted feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: Idazlan, istorio eta zirriborro argiagoetarako AI Writing Coach AI ikasteko erabiltzeko modu fokuratua da, erantzun-bilketa pasiboaren ordez. Modua lan zehatz baten inguruan eraikita dago: hobetu idazlanak, istorioak, emailak eta argudioak zure ahotsa bere horretan mantentzen duen feedback zehatzarekin.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Eskatu lehen urrats txiki bat azken erantzunaren ordez.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Eskatu AIari zure arrazoiketa egiaztatzeko, ez emaitza bakarrik.

entries.source: Clarify your point.
entries.value: Argitu zure puntua.

entries.source: Communication
entries.value: Komunikazioa

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Amaitu ideia oroimenez berriro idatziz.

entries.source: Improve structure.
entries.value: Hobetu egitura.

entries.source: Learners writing essays, stories, emails, scholarship notes, or arguments.
entries.value: Saiakerak, istorioak, mezu elektronikoak, beketarako oharrak edo argudioak idazten dituzten ikasleentzat.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Probatzeko promptak

entries.source: Revise with a reason.
entries.value: Berrikusi arrazoi batekin.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Writing Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Reading Companion. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Hasi modu bizia Writing Coach-en. Alboko ikaskuntza-formatu bat nahi baduzu, probatu Reading Companion. Plataformaren ikuspegi zabalagorako, irakurri AI ikaskuntza-lagun batek guztientzat zer egin beharko lukeen.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Esan moduari zer ikasi edo ekoitzi nahi duzun.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Alde hori fluxuan agertzen da. Erantzun erraldoi bakarraren ordez, saiorik onenak ziklo batean mugitzen dira: helburua ezarri, zerbait probatu, feedbacka jaso, puntu ahula konpondu eta hurrengo ekintza aukeratu.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Foku horrek axola du. Chatbot orokor batek ia edozeri erantzun diezaioke, baina ikaskuntza-modu batek elkarrizketari forma ematen dio. Ideia itsasten laguntzen duen pentsamendu, praktika, feedback edo esplorazio motara bultzatzen zaitu.

entries.source: The coach gives targeted revision priorities and before-after examples without replacing your voice.
entries.value: Gidariak berrikusteko lehentasun zehatzak eta aurretik-ondoren adibideak ematen ditu zure ahotsa ordezkatu gabe.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hau da AIarekin zeure buruari tranparik egin gabe ikastearen atzean dagoen ohitura bera: mantendu ikaslea aktibo. AI erabilgarriena da zure pentsamenduari buruzko feedbacka ematen dizunean.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Modu hau bereziki erabilgarria da honako hau nahi duten ikasleentzat:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Saiatu urratsa zure hitzekin.

entries.source: Use Writing Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Erabili Writing Coach azkar hasten baina oraindik zuri egokitzen zaion saio bat nahi duzunean. Lehen helburua ez da ikusgarria entzutea. Lehen helburua hurrengo urratsa posible sentitzea da.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Modu honek zertan laguntzen duen

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Nora joan hurrena

entries.source: Writing Coach
entries.value: Idazketa-gidaria

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Zure benetako arazoaren bertsio zirriborro batekin ere has zaitezke. Lehen prompt nahasia ondo dago. Saioak maila, audientzia, epea eta estiloa argitu ditzake behin hasten zarenean.
